summary: First-finish smoke test of the Tsvetelina portfolio site. Backend default endpoints untouched and working. Frontend loads well; nav, hero, projects grid + dialog, contact copy/social links, mobile menu all work. Two real bugs found: skills marquee ribbons are missing data-testid attributes, and one of the 4 ArtStation project images is broken (returns non-image).
passed: Homepage loads with hero-title and hero-view-work visible
Clicking project-card-kaisa opens project-dialog with valid ArtStation external link (https://www.artstation.com/artwork/Ov22VK)
social-artstation, social-instagram, social-email all have valid hrefs
Mobile viewport: nav-menu-toggle opens menu with all nav links visible (verified via screenshot)

failed.issue: Missing data-testid='skills-marquee-1' and 'skills-marquee-2' on the two marquee ribbons
failed.evidence: page.locator('[data-testid="skills-marquee-1"]').count() === 0 and skills-marquee-2 count === 0. Spec explicitly requires these testids.

failed.issue: One of the 4 ArtStation project images fails to load (broken image)
failed.evidence: Broken src: https://cdna.artstation.com/p/assets/images/images/099/694/802/20260605135705/large/tsvetelina-img-0428.jpg?1780685825 (naturalWidth=0). Likely the James McAvoy or Anime card.

failed.issue: Toast 'Email copied to clipboard' not detected in DOM text after clicking copy-email-btn
failed.evidence: body inner_text did not contain 'copied' after click. May be due to clipboard API being blocked in headless browser (permission denied silently) rather than a code bug. Worth manual re-verification.

action_items: Add data-testid='skills-marquee-1' and data-testid='skills-marquee-2' to the two <Marquee> elements in /app/frontend/src/components/portfolio/Skills.jsx
Replace the broken ArtStation image URL in /app/frontend/src/data/portfolio.js (tsvetelina-img-0428.jpg?1780685825) with a working image URL
Manually verify copy-email toast in a real browser; if it doesn't appear, ensure sonner <Toaster /> is mounted and clipboard fallback works
